creator: mohawk@bsdsx.fr
text:
fix authentification
improve regression
simplify Makefile

Fix:
Patch attached with submission follows:

diff -ruN mohawk.orig/Makefile mohawk/Makefile
--- mohawk.orig/Makefile	2014-06-01 08:56:51.000000000 +0200
+++ mohawk/Makefile	2014-06-01 08:57:11.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: head/www/mohawk/Makefile 351753 2014-04-22 06:36:07Z culot $
 
 PORTNAME=	mohawk
-PORTVERSION=	2.0.12
+PORTVERSION=	2.0.13
 CATEGORIES=	www ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=	http://fossil.bsdsx.fr/mohawk/tarball/ \
 		http://fossil.etoilebsd.net/mohawk/tarball/
diff -ruN mohawk.orig/distinfo mohawk/distinfo
--- mohawk.orig/distinfo	2014-06-01 08:56:51.000000000 +0200
+++ mohawk/distinfo	2014-06-01 09:00:48.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (mohawk-2.0.12.tar.gz?uuid=2.0.12) = ac7b5dde7e12ef8ca72bb926ca25a4256c581b4cb6fae67a23aae1016d832b4e
-SIZE (mohawk-2.0.12.tar.gz?uuid=2.0.12) = 37890
+SHA256 (mohawk-2.0.13.tar.gz?uuid=2.0.13) = 8511cfc3a8058530d409b64bc6e07be19f4f3c19a5adf859073414af762e6038
+SIZE (mohawk-2.0.13.tar.gz?uuid=2.0.13) = 38087
